Pebble app for testing frame rendering performance, build scripts, and version control settings.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Pebble app for testing frame rendering performance and displaying FPS statistics with bitmap image data.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies to ignore build-generated files in the version control system.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the FPS Test app, including UUID, version, and company information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options to include worker and JavaScript files.
